class.name: AutoworkE2EServer
class.brief_description: Internal WebSocket orchestration server for the Autowork framework.
class.description: An internal engine singleton deployed globally when the application is launched with E2E capabilities. It binds directly to the active [SceneTree] and opens a strictly formatted WebSocket server, listening defensively for HMAC-authenticated UI orchestration and node querying payloads from web runners like Playwright and Jest.
